parameters.content:
## AAE Specialist Think
Attach OpenAI credential after import.
Webhook: POST /webhook/specialist-think
Single tool: execute_tool → https://ai.neberg.de/api/agents/execute-tool
Done: route-chat-message to managerId

options.systemMessage: You are a tool-agnostic AAE specialist. Use only execute_tool for work. Never access the filesystem directly. Never use teamleiter naming. End with JSON {"content":"..."}.

parameters.name: execute_tool
parameters.description: Execute an allowed AAE tool via the backend gateway. Pass tool name from allowedTools and args object.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ threadId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.threadId, agentId: $('Normalize Input').item.json.senderAgentId, tool: $fromAI('tool', 'Tool name from allowedTools', 'string'), args: JSON.parse($fromAI('argsJson', 'Tool args as JSON object string', 'string') || '{}') }) }}

values.name: argsJson
values.description: Tool arguments as a JSON object string
